text.content: "Look at this with me. I follow Team A’s bar to the top. Then I follow it’s height over to the axis. The bar ends halfway between 30 and 40. The scale is counting by 10, so half of 10 is 5. I count halfway up from 30: 30 plus 5 equals 35. The bar shows 35 because it ends exactly in the middle between those two lines."

text.content: "Not quite there yet. The numbers you reach counting by 10s end right at the axis lines. Markers is 30, right at a line. Paintbrushes is 20, also at a line. The others are between axis lines. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. Place each bar exactly where it should end."

rich_text.plain_text: "Not quite there yet. The numbers you reach counting by 10s end right at the axis lines. Markers is 30, right at a line. Paintbrushes is 20, also at a line. The others are between axis lines. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. Place each bar exactly where it should end."

text.content: ❌ Student did not correctly place all four bars. System models the answer.

rich_text.plain_text: ❌ Student did not correctly place all four bars. System models the answer.

text.content: System sets all four bars: Markers at 30, Crayons at 45, Paintbrushes at 20, Glue Sticks at 55.

rich_text.plain_text: System sets all four bars: Markers at 30, Crayons at 45, Paintbrushes at 20, Glue Sticks at 55.

text.content: "Let’s look at how this is done together. Markers is 30. Count by 10s along the axis. 10, 20, 30, stop right at the 30 line. Crayons is 45. 10, 20, 30, 40, then place it halfway between 40 and 50. Paintbrushes is 20. 10, 20, place it right at the 20 line. Glue Sticks is 55. 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, then keep going to halfway between 50 and 60. Some bars end at the lines. Some end between the lines. Now the graph shows all four values from the data table with the exact bar heights."

rich_text.plain_text: "Let’s look at how this is done together. Markers is 30. Count by 10s along the axis. 10, 20, 30, stop right at the 30 line. Crayons is 45. 10, 20, 30, 40, then place it halfway between 40 and 50. Paintbrushes is 20. 10, 20, place it right at the 20 line. Glue Sticks is 55. 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, then keep going to halfway between 50 and 60. Some bars end at the lines. Some end between the lines. Now the graph shows all four values from the data table with the exact bar heights."

rich_text.plain_text: "Use the graph you made. How many more Glue Sticks were collected than Markers?"

text.content: "Here's the process to follow. We find the values for the 2 categories we need to compare. Glue Sticks is halfway between 50 and 60 at 55. Markers is at 30 exactly. To find how many more, we subtract: 55 minus 30 equals 25. There were 25 more Glue Sticks collected than Markers."
